changes.value:
Move shared types into `infrastructure.rs` and `process.rs`, test helpers into `test_helpers.rs`. Re-export from mod.rs. No operations move yet.

- `infrastructure.rs`: DefaultShellConfig, ShellExecuteRequest, ShellExecutionResult, OutputLimits, OutputBuffer + helpers (find_safe_truncation_point, append_to_buffer_impl, is_binary_content, format_output_content), ShellError + impls, OutputBuffer unit tests
- `process.rs`: AsyncProcessGuard, OutputLineContext, all stream/spawn/format functions (process_output_line, process_stream_line_result, read_remaining_stream_output, read_remaining_with_context, setup_output_capture, collect_remaining_output, stream_output_until_complete, process_child_output_with_limits, prepare_working_directory, prepare_shell_command, spawn_command_process, spawn_shell_command, execute_with_guard, send_completion_notification, format_execution_result, validate_shell_request, parse_environment_variables, send_start_notification, format_success_result, format_error_result), AsyncProcessGuard tests
- `test_helpers.rs`: TestCommandBuilder, assert_blocked, shared_tool, execute_op helpers, ResultValidator, parse_execution_result, extract_text, etc.

**Verify**: `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-tools`

changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
-Move shared types into `infrastructure.rs` and `process.rs`, test helpers into `test_helpers.rs`. Re-export from mod.rs. No operations move yet.
+Move shared types into `infrastructure.rs` and `process.rs`, test helpers into `test_helpers.rs`. Re-export from mod.rs. No operations move yet. All files under `shell/` (flattened, no `execute/` subfolder).

-- `infrastructure.rs`: DefaultShellConfig, ShellExecuteRequest, ShellExecutionResult, OutputLimits, OutputBuffer + helpers (find_safe_truncation_point, append_to_buffer_impl, is_binary_content, format_output_content), ShellError + impls, OutputBuffer unit tests
-- `process.rs`: AsyncProcessGuard, OutputLineContext, all stream/spawn/format functions (process_output_line, process_stream_line_result, read_remaining_stream_output, read_remaining_with_context, setup_output_capture, collect_remaining_output, stream_output_until_complete, process_child_output_with_limits, prepare_working_directory, prepare_shell_command, spawn_command_process, spawn_shell_command, execute_with_guard, send_completion_notification, format_execution_result, validate_shell_request, parse_environment_variables, send_start_notification, format_success_result, format_error_result), AsyncProcessGuard tests
-- `test_helpers.rs`: TestCommandBuilder, assert_blocked, shared_tool, execute_op helpers, ResultValidator, parse_execution_result, extract_text, etc.
+- `shell/infrastructure.rs`: DefaultShellConfig, ShellExecuteRequest, ShellExecutionResult, OutputLimits, OutputBuffer + helpers (find_safe_truncation_point, append_to_buffer_impl, is_binary_content, format_output_content), ShellError + impls, OutputBuffer unit tests
+- `shell/process.rs`: AsyncProcessGuard, OutputLineContext, all stream/spawn/format functions, AsyncProcessGuard tests
+- `shell/test_helpers.rs`: TestCommandBuilder, assert_blocked, shared_tool, execute_op helpers, ResultValidator, parse_execution_result, extract_text, etc.

 **Verify**: `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-tools`
\ No newline at end of file
